enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings, portraying a dreamlike connection between lovers.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Vanakkam Chennai, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the music director of this song?

The music for this song is composed by Anirudh, known for his catchy and melodious tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 11, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oh Penne Penne Internation Version, the lyrics beautifully convey the feelings of love and connection between two individuals. The song serves as a backdrop to romantic moments in Vanakkam Chennai, enhancing the emotional landscape of the film. With its soothing melody and heartfelt expressions, it evokes a sense of intimacy and warmth. This track is perfect for anyone looking to celebrate love and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Penne Penne Internation Version from Vanakkam Chennai encapsulates the essence of romance with its dreamy lyrics and soothing melody. Anirudh's enchanting composition creates a magical atmosphere that resonates with lovers. This song is a perfect blend of heartfelt emotions and captivating rhythms, making it a must-listen for anyone in love.
stanzaMeanings: I want to hold you, lie on your shoulder. You're all I see when I dream. You're the air that I breathe.
Girl, just close your eyes, put your hand with mine, and let the world fade away. Here it's just you and me.
That's enough. You spin my world into two, so my heart beats with your beat, singing my melody.
Under the candlelight, our bodies stand too close. What the world cannot see is what you found in me.
Oh girl, you show me the way. When I look in your eyes, you take my breath away.
Oh girl, you show me the way. When I look in your eyes, you take my breath away.
I never want to see us fighting. Forget the thunder and lightning. I hold you until we see the morning light. Never leave your side.
I crossed seven seas to come for you. This river meets the sea for you.
I will create a moonlight that will shine on you.
Those stars come down and settle on your eyes. They ask for a little space.
Today in your hand, I am like a doll that swings. That's your femininity.
Oh girl, you show me the way. When I look in your eyes, you take my breath away.
Oh girl, you show me the way. When I look in your eyes, you take my breath away.
I never want to see us fighting. Forget the thunder and lightning. I hold you to see the morning light. Never leave your side.
That's enough. You spin my world into two, so my heart beats with your beat, singing my melody.
Under the candlelight, our bodies stand too close. What the world cannot see is what you found in me.
Oh girl, you show me the way. When I look in your eyes, you take my breath away.
